hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects risk signals, provider outputs, and regulatory rules to automate and structure approval workflows with audit-ready decision logs across your compliance operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Approval workflows slow with inconsistent policies
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to enforce standardized approval processes across varying risk levels and multiple disconnected systems. This results in manual routing, duplicated reviews, and weak audit trails that complicate case management and regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies provider checks, policy rules, reviewer decisions and audit evidence into one controlled workflow that reduces manual routing and enforces consistent approvals across risk levels.
workflow_title: From provider checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY structures provider outputs through configurable rules, risk-based routing, case review and decision logging to support standardized approval workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY standardizes approval workflows by connecting provider outputs into structured reviews, decision logs, cases, evidence and reporting without replacing existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations with structured provider orchestration, audit-ready decision evidence and enterprise deployment for controlled, scalable and auditable approval workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help standardize approval workflows for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY routes case reviews by risk levels
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how approval decisions are recorded with audit evidence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how policy updates integrate into compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit-ready workflows for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY standardize approval workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal risk rules and policies consistently across approval paths, routing reviews by risk level and standardizing decisions through auditable workflows and case management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case records and related evidence in an organized audit trail, supporting review readiness and traceability for compliance inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into one operational layer without requiring changes to current vendor integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements providers by structuring their outputs into workflows, cases and reports without replacing onboarding, KYT, or screening services.
final_title: Standardize approval workflows across risk levels
final_description: Review how SFTY structures risk signals, provider outputs, policies and decision logs into controlled approval workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
